quotes.text: Talk is cheap. Show me the code.
quotes.author: Linus Torvalds

quotes.text: The most disastrous thing that you can ever learn is your first programming language.
quotes.author: Alan Kay

quotes.text: The best way to predict the future is to invent it.
quotes.author: Alan Kay

quotes.text: Simple things should be simple, complex things should be possible.
quotes.author: Alan Kay

quotes.text: A ship in port is safe, but that's not what ships are built for.
quotes.author: Grace Hopper

quotes.text: The most damaging phrase in the language is: It's always been done that way.
quotes.author: Grace Hopper

quotes.text: One accurate measurement is worth a thousand expert opinions.
quotes.author: Grace Hopper

quotes.text: If it's a good idea, go ahead and do it. It is much easier to apologize than it is to get permission.
quotes.author: Grace Hopper

quotes.text: Premature optimization is the root of all evil.
quotes.author: Donald Knuth

quotes.text: Beware of bugs in the above code; I have only proved it correct, not tried it.
quotes.author: Donald Knuth

quotes.text: Programs are meant to be read by humans and only incidentally for computers to execute.
quotes.author: Donald Knuth

quotes.text: The art of programming is the art of organizing complexity.
quotes.author: Edsger Dijkstra

quotes.text: Simplicity is prerequisite for reliability.
quotes.author: Edsger Dijkstra

quotes.text: If debugging is the process of removing software bugs, then programming must be the process of putting them in.
quotes.author: Edsger Dijkstra

quotes.text: Computer science is no more about computers than astronomy is about telescopes.
quotes.author: Edsger Dijkstra

quotes.text: The question of whether a computer can think is no more interesting than the question of whether a submarine can swim.
quotes.author: Edsger Dijkstra

quotes.text: Any fool can write code that a computer can understand. Good programmers write code that humans can understand.
quotes.author: Martin Fowler

quotes.text: First, solve the problem. Then, write the code.
quotes.author: John Johnson

quotes.text: Experience is the name everyone gives to their mistakes.
quotes.author: Oscar Wilde

quotes.text: In order to be irreplaceable, one must always be different.
quotes.author: Coco Chanel

quotes.text: Java is to JavaScript what car is to carpet.
quotes.author: Chris Heilmann

quotes.text: Knowledge is power.
quotes.author: Francis Bacon

quotes.text: Perfection is achieved not when there is nothing more to add, but rather when there is nothing more to take away.
quotes.author: Antoine de Saint-Exupery

quotes.text: Code is like humor. When you have to explain it, it's bad.
quotes.author: Cory House

quotes.text: Fix the cause, not the symptom.
quotes.author: Steve Maguire

quotes.text: Optimism is an occupational hazard of programming: feedback is the treatment.
quotes.author: Kent Beck

quotes.text: Make it work, make it right, make it fast.
quotes.author: Kent Beck

quotes.text: When in doubt, use brute force.
quotes.author: Ken Thompson

quotes.text: One of my most productive days was throwing away 1000 lines of code.
quotes.author: Ken Thompson

quotes.text: Deleted code is debugged code.
quotes.author: Jeff Sickel

quotes.text: The function of good software is to make the complex appear to be simple.
quotes.author: Grady Booch

quotes.text: That's the thing about people who think they hate computers. What they really hate is lousy programmers.
quotes.author: Larry Niven

quotes.text: Software is like entropy: it is difficult to grasp, weighs nothing, and obeys the second law of thermodynamics; i.e., it always increases.
quotes.author: Norman Augustine

quotes.text: It's not a bug; it's an undocumented feature.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: Nine people can't make a baby in a month.
quotes.author: Fred Brooks

quotes.text: There is no single development, in either technology or management technique, which by itself promises even one order of magnitude improvement within a decade in productivity.
quotes.author: Fred Brooks

quotes.text: Before software can be reusable it first has to be usable.
quotes.author: Ralph Johnson

quotes.text: Programming isn't about what you know; it's about what you can figure out.
quotes.author: Chris Pine

quotes.text: The only way to learn a new programming language is by writing programs in it.
quotes.author: Dennis Ritchie

quotes.text: UNIX is basically a simple operating system, but you have to be a genius to understand the simplicity.
quotes.author: Dennis Ritchie

quotes.text: Most good programmers do programming not because they expect to get paid or get adulation by the public, but because it is fun to program.
quotes.author: Linus Torvalds

quotes.text: Software is a great combination between artistry and engineering.
quotes.author: Bill Gates

quotes.text: Measuring programming progress by lines of code is like measuring aircraft building progress by weight.
quotes.author: Bill Gates

quotes.text: The advance of technology is based on making it fit in so that you don't really even notice it, so it's part of everyday life.
quotes.author: Bill Gates

quotes.text: Sometimes it pays to stay in bed on Monday, rather than spending the rest of the week debugging Monday's code.
quotes.author: Dan Salomon

quotes.text: Programming is the art of telling another human being what one wants the computer to do.
quotes.author: Donald Knuth

quotes.text: Controlling complexity is the essence of computer programming.
quotes.author: Brian Kernighan

quotes.text: Everyone knows that debugging is twice as hard as writing a program in the first place. So if you're as clever as you can be when you write it, how will you ever debug it?
quotes.author: Brian Kernighan

quotes.text: Don't comment bad code — rewrite it.
quotes.author: Brian Kernighan

quotes.text: Walking on water and developing software from a specification are easy if both are frozen.
quotes.author: Edward V. Berard

quotes.text: The best error message is the one that never shows up.
quotes.author: Thomas Fuchs

quotes.text: A language that doesn't affect the way you think about programming is not worth knowing.
quotes.author: Alan Perlis

quotes.text: There are only two kinds of languages: the ones people complain about and the ones nobody uses.
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: C makes it easy to shoot yourself in the foot; C++ makes it harder, but when you do it blows your whole leg off.
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup

quotes.text: Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
quotes.author: Arthur C. Clarke
